element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Enemy elimination and distance-based switch activation
Projectile blocking and vertical movement via shield-gliding
Coordinating three characters to solve puzzles
All three vikings must reach exit; failure of one makes level unwinnable
Item swapping and inventory management between characters
Combat via Baleog's sword/bow; evasion via Olaf's shield
Coordinating all three characters across spatial sequences

typical_tension_triggers: Narrow platforming sections requiring precise timing
Puzzle where character death makes level unwinnable
High-fall scenarios with limited safe landing zones
Time-pressure from pursuing enemies or hazards
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Gradual escalation from introduction of individual skills to complex multi-character puzzle sequences; tension builds through increased spatial complexity and synergy requirements rather than action speed

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of three character abilities separately; simple single-character platforming with safe puzzle environments
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Integration of multi-character synergy; increased platforming precision required; introduction of coordinated puzzle sequences
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex spatial puzzles requiring all three characters to work in tandem; high-consequence platforming sections; dense enemy encounters
notable_spikes: Transition from single-character to multi-character puzzle requirements
Levels introducing mandatory coordination across long spatial distances
End-game levels with combined enemy density and platforming precision demands

notable_level_patterns.description: Characters placed in separate areas requiring coordinated actions (Baleog hitting switch with arrow to open door for Erik, while Olaf shields incoming projectiles)
Olaf's shield used as a platform for other characters to reach higher areas, requiring precise positioning
Erik breaks through walls to open new passages, often blocking others until path is cleared
Multiple enemies requiring Baleog's combat focus while other characters navigate hazards
Olaf hang-glides from high platforms while other characters navigate alternate routes to converge at exit
